title: Permitted
description: A mod adding Hermitcraft-style permits to the game!
body:
# Permitted

A mod adding Hermitcraft-style permits to the game!

## Features

- Integration with [Create: Numismatics](https://modrinth.com/mod/numismatics)
- Easy setup (use the `/permit` command!)
- Non-craftable!
- Rarities/tiers!
- Useful tooltips!
- Multiple item support!
- Custom names!
- And much more!
